titleStmt.title: SII 27.370: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 370. (A.R. No. 478 of 1928-29.) INDABETTU, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the deserted Vīrabhadra temple in a field in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1394, Vijaya, Kārttika śu. 15 corresponding to 1473 A.D., November 4. The details are not verifiable. The Śaka year is wrong for 1395.

It records a gift of land by Kāmi[rā]ya-arasa also called Baṅga, to Nanjappa for worshipping god Vīrabhadradēva of Baṁgavāḍi. It was stipulated that the land was to be enjoyed by the donee hereditarily and if he did not haveany issues the gift land would be the property of god Vīrabhadradēya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataĒ namaḥ . namastuṁga śi
raścuṁbi . caṁdracāmaracāravē trayilō
kyanagarāraṁbhaṁ . mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti jayābhyudaya
vaha śakavaruṣa 1394 neyavarttamāna vija
ya saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 15 neu baṁga
vāḍiya śrīvīrabhadra dēvara Amrutapaḍi
ya dharṁmake kāmirāya Arasarāda ba
ṁgaru barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramave
ṁteṁdare pālaśaṁtaḍukada bhūmi bayalu bi
ttuva mu 17 beṭṭu majilu mu 38 Ubhayaṁ
palasaṁtaḍukadalli bi(ṁ)ttuva mu 45 kaḷaliyalu bi
ttuva bayalu mu 18 Ubhayaṁ bage Eraḍa
kaṁ bittuva muḍe tāḍe bayalu mu 25 beṁdu
majalu mu 28 Ubhayaṁ mu 53 Akṣaradalu
muḍetāḍe Ayivattumuṟu Aḍake saluvakare
mare sahavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭivāgi Ā bhūmi
yanu naṁjappanū baḷi vīrabhadradēvara Amrutapaḍi
ge prativarusa 1 kke naḍasibaha bhattamu 100 Akṣarada
lu nuṟumuḍe bhattavanu naḍasi Ā devara dēvapūjeya
nu māḍikoṁḍu saṁtāna Abhivṛddhiyāgi gaṁ

ḍu saṁtāna Uṁṭādare Avaru kartta
rāgi bāḷuvadu yillade yidda
re Ātana heṁṇusaṁtāna bāḷuvā
ru Ā naṁjappana gaṁḍusaṁtāna heṁ
ṇu saṁtāna villadeyiddare Avaruga
ḷa soṁmmu saṁmmaṁdau Ā bhūmiyū
vīrabhadradēvarige saluUdu yi dhaṁ
rmmaka Āvanānobbanu Aḷupidare vā
ṇarasiyali sahasrakapileya koṁ
da dōṣiyahanu yidarṁmavanu Āva
nobba pratipāllisidare yihada
li sakala sukhavanu Anubhōgisu
vanu padadalli śrīviṣṇuvina parama
padavaneyiduvanu Eṁdu barasikoṭṭa
śilāśāsana yi bhūmige sese si
ddāya naḍubeḍudukha Osase
Audu salladu Eṁdu barasi ko
ṭṭa sarvvamāṁnya śrī vīrabhadradēva
radēvaṣya . Oppa śrīsōmanātā .
Digital edition of SII 27.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
